semantic.$description: Dark theme: green-700 page background with light text. Only colour tokens are overridden; non-colour semantics (typography, spacing, radius) remain identical across themes.

surface-panel.$description: Panel/card background — dark navy for contrast with green page

surface-accent.$description: Accent surface — darker green so text-primary (white) passes 4.5:1

border-subtle.$description: Dividers and panel borders — mint on green (3.91:1)

text-primary.$description: Primary body text — warm white (4.78:1 on green-700)

text-secondary.$description: Secondary text — same as primary on green-700 (paper-100 fails 4.5:1)

text-inverse.$description: Text on accent/light surfaces — dark navy (8.00:1 on oak-green-300)

accent.$description: Primary accent on green page — white links/buttons (4.78:1 on green-700)

accent-strong.$description: Hover/active accent — mint on green for visible state change (3.91:1 on green-700, passes 3:1 non-text)

focus-ring.$description: Focus indicator — white on green (4.78:1, exceeds 3:1 non-text)

focus-ring-on-accent.$description: Focus ring on accent surfaces — white on dark green (6.49:1)

error.$description: Error states — white on green page. Styling distinguishes via icon/border, not colour alone.
